condition: farm.current_crop.toLowerCase() === 'wheat' && farm.soil_ph !== undefined && farm.soil_ph !== null && farm.soil_ph < 6
advisory: Your soil is somewhat acidic for wheat. Consider applying agricultural lime to raise the pH to optimal levels (6.0 - 7.0).
High humidity detected. There is an elevated risk for Rice Blast disease. Ensure proper water drainage and prepare preemptive fungicide if symptoms appear.
Heavy rainfall forecast! Delay any pesticide application to prevent wash-off, and ensure field drainage channels are clear.
Since your farm area is small, consider high-density planting techniques to maximize yield per acre.
